subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Hasan, inasmuch as thou hast entered within the stronghold of My love, which was raised up through the tablets of the Command, and verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بارک الله علیک یا حسن بما وردت فی حصن حبی الذی کان من زبر الامر معمورا و انه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
